category_labels.A: Model omission   (title present in PDF text, agent did not extract it)
category_labels.B: Matching failure  (agent extracted close title, normalisation failed)
category_labels.C: Absent from PDF  (title not found anywhere in extracted text)
category_labels.D: Corrupted PDF    (text found but garbled / unreadable)
category_labels.E: Suspicious gold  (gold record looks malformed, truncated, or non-standard)
